projects.title: Open Source Projects
projects.description: Developing open-source tools to simplify and enhance software development.

derafu_chart.name: Derafu Chart
derafu_chart.description: A PHP library for generating charts with GD or other custom renderers.

derafu_twig.name: Derafu Twig
derafu_twig.description: A Twig extension with filters and components for the template system in PHP.

derafu_lib.name: Derafu Lib
derafu_lib.description: A PHP library with a base and standardized structure for creating another libraries.

flobix.name: Flobix
flobix.description: An educational tool that enables learning through images and symbols.

liberalism.name: Civil Responsibility and Freedom
liberalism.description: Respect for individual life projects based on non-aggression principles.

finance.name: Personal Finance
finance.description: Only informative content. No investment recommendations.

community.title: Community Initiatives
community.description: Fostering projects that promote collaboration, inclusion, and shared knowledge.

guarida.name: Guarida
guarida.description: A gaming space and community focused on collectible card games and RPGs.

team.title: Team
team.description: Meet the people behind Derafu ORG, committed to open-source and educational initiatives.

esteban.name: Esteban De La Fuente
esteban.bio: Creator of Derafu ORG, passionate about software development, automation, and business strategies. With years of experience in building innovative solutions. Currently completing an MBA.

marcela.name: Marcela Morales
marcela.bio: Passionate about education and business management, with a background in early childhood education and a diploma in marketing. Currently expanding her skills in programming.

valentina.name: Valentina De La Fuente
valentina.bio: Kinesiologist transitioning into the tech world. Passionate about technology, well-being, and mindfulness through yoga. Currently completing a programming bootcamp.

contact.title: Contact & Collaboration
contact.description: If you're interested in contributing or collaborating, reach out to us.
